title: feat(cli): add dev session duration, package manager, and component tracking

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(cli): add analytics tracking to mastra studio command

summary: Adds three analytics improvements to the CLI: (1) tracks dev session duration by firing a `cli_dev_session_end` event on SIGINT/SIGTERM with duration in ms and minutes, (2) includes the detected package manager (npm/yarn/pnpm/bun) in all analytics events via `getSystemProperties()`, and (3) fires a `cli_components_selected` event during `mastra create` for both interactive and CLI-args paths. Changes span 3 files in the CLI package only.
maintainerNotes: Small, well-scoped analytics enhancement from a maintainer. No automated tests (analytics tracking is hard to unit test), but includes a manual test plan in the description. Missing a changeset. CI shows Core Package Tests and Memory Tests failing, but those are unrelated to the CLI analytics changes (likely flaky or pre-existing failures). CodeRabbit flagged two valid issues: (1) `handleShutdown` is not idempotent — multiple signals could cause duplicate events, and (2) `analytics.shutdown()` is only called when `serverStartTime` exists, so queued events may not flush if the server never started. Both are minor but worth addressing before merge.
